name: scratch4js-monorepo
description: Edit Scratch .sb3 projects from JavaScript, plus an MCP server!

scripts.build:tw-ext: pnpm --filter web-editor build && PUBLIC_PATH=/scratch4js/tw-ext/ pnpm --filter tw-extension-maker build
scripts.build:dev-local: pnpm --filter web-editor build && PUBLIC_PATH=/scratch4js/dev-local/ pnpm --filter dev-local build
scripts.docs:build: rspress build && pnpm run build:tw-ext && rm -rf doc_build/tw-ext && cp -r packages/tw-extension-maker/dist doc_build/tw-ext && pnpm run build:dev-local && rm -rf doc_build/dev-local && cp -r packages/dev-local/dist doc_build/dev-local
